productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Solid Yellow Tshirt
description: Composition Yellow polo t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with ribbed cuffs and an appliqué d digit on the right sleeve, ribbed collar with a buttoned chest placket, embroidered and appliqué d branding on the left chest, and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Tumble dry low Warm iron Do not iron on decorations Project your love for the game with this stylish t-shirt from US Polo. The classic styling on this tee makes it perfect for casual and semi-formal occasions. Pair this with straight fit denims and canvas shoes.
